creator: Dave.Duchscher@net.tamu.edu
text:
net/p5-Net-DNS out of date.  This module has been updated and
        is now at version 0.12.  Version 0.11 is specified in the
        Makefile and is no longer available on CPAN.

Fix: 

Change version to 0.12 in Makefile and do a make makesum.
How-To-Repeat: 
	make
